R1_title_page_reframe.v3_9_framing: Not submission-ready until gold validation is completed.
R1_title_page_reframe.v3_10_framing: Silver-stage pilot manuscript with a pre-registered gold validation protocol

R2_VI_conditional_framing.text: All numerical results in this section are silver-stage pilot results... If the planned gold adjudication in VII supports the silver labels, these patterns will be treated as validated pilot findings; otherwise, the affected claims will be downgraded according to the pre-registered criteria in VII.G.

R3_silver_label_qualifiers.qualifier_pattern: on silver labels / in the silver-stage evaluation

v3_10_contributions: We construct a silver-stage SimClaim diagnostic set...
We evaluate whether LLM judges under-detect strong_action_overclaim under tested prompts...
We pre-register a gold validation protocol...

R6_R4_screening_FP_TP.positioning: high-recall screening layer, not final automatic labeler

R7_strong_action_as_hypothesis.text: The separability of strong_action_overclaim as a reliably drawable class is a hypothesis to be tested by the planned gold validation (VII), not an assumption taken as already proven.

R8_external_transferability_probe.concession: public data cannot test the four-class evidence-sufficiency taxonomy

structure: ask advisor to judge taxonomy + positioning, not experiment validity
if approved, proceed with 50-sample blind gold pilot
if not approved, revise structure before gold

top_3_residual_risks: 62.5% of silver labels flagged questionable/unclear in author sanity audit — gold may overturn silver patterns
R4 macro-F1 0.22 lower than LLM judges — screening positioning depends on gold FP/TP <= 10 threshold
50-sample gold pilot is small for confirmatory claims — may need follow-up expansion
recommended_next_step: Send V3.10 to advisor with cover note. Do NOT run gold before advisor review. If advisor approves taxonomy + positioning, proceed with 50-sample blind gold pilot per frozen protocol in §VII.
